name: leading spaces stay with the first chunk
Polish abbreviations do not create sentence breaks
text: Dr inż. Kowalski wrócił. Potem spał.

name: Unicode punctuation and ranges use source bytes
text: Zażółć gęślą, jaźń — dobrze? Tak… świetnie!

name: repeated substrings advance from the prior source range
forced flush emits text below the trigger
final schedule headroom avoids a split
hard limits split text without boundaries
sentence separator whitespace stays on the prior chunk
text: In case you don't know, you can run /side or just use the plus button on the top right to open side conversations. This is great for context management, going down rabbit holes, side-questions like "wait why did you do it that way", etc

expected.text: In case you don't know, you can run /side or just use the plus button on the top right to open side conversations.
This is great for context management, going down rabbit holes, side-questions like "wait why did you do it that way", etc

name: sentence whitespace may extend past the trigger
Polish street abbreviation stays with its value
text: Adres to ul. Długa obok parku.

name: word pieces do not pack through the trigger
